macro_summary: KSE-100 extends bull run for a fourth straight session; oil falls further as supply starts moving through Strait of Hormuz post US-Iran deal (deflationary for fuel-linked CPI, margin headwind for E&P, volume tailwind for OMCs); Select Technologies IPO registration formally opens; foreign loan inflows surge to $12.1bn; ADB $700m insurance-sector loan approved; FDI outflow-of-profit story flags persistent external-account fragility.

OGDC.summary: Oil continuing to fall as Hormuz supply resumes post-deal pressures E&P realised prices; yesterday's FY26 production-target miss is still the freshest fundamental headline. Slightly less negative than yesterday since today's allowlisted flow lacks a second negative.
headlines: Oil falls as supply starts moving through Strait of Hormuz
Pakistan misses oil, gas production targets as drilling falls short in FY26

PPL.summary: Same Hormuz-driven oil-price pressure and yesterday's FY26 production miss apply to PPL's volumes and realisations.
headlines: Oil falls as supply starts moving through Strait of Hormuz
Pakistan misses oil, gas production targets as drilling falls short in FY26

SNGP.summary: No fresh allowlisted news in this 24h window for SNGP specifically; carrying forward a mild negative tilt from yesterday's FY26 gas-production miss as the most recent material fact.
headlines: Pakistan misses oil, gas production targets as drilling falls short in FY26

SSGC.summary: No fresh allowlisted news today; yesterday's production-miss/steel-revival-demand offset nets out to neutral and that balance carries forward.

PSO.summary: PM directing immediate fuel-price relief on falling global oil, with a possible Rs55/litre cut from June 20 — a clear OMC volume and sentiment tailwind; $2bn sovereign Eurobond/Sukuk plan continues to support FX/circular-debt backdrop.
headlines: PM Shehbaz directs immediate fuel price relief as global oil prices fall: petroleum minister
Pakistan to Raise $2b via Eurobonds, Sukuk in 2026-27

PRL.summary: Falling fuel prices and the broader oil-price decline ease feedstock costs / support throughput economics for refiners, a mild positive carried from yesterday's Attock-group developments.
headlines: Pakistan Fuel Price Drop: How Much Will It Fall?

AIRLINK.summary: Select Technologies IPO registration formally opened today (book building June 22-23 confirmed yesterday) — the catalyst is now live, not just scheduled.

PIBTL.summary: No new allowlisted item today; carrying forward yesterday's Engro Vopak / Port Qasim terminal renewal as the most recent material fact for the terminal sector.
headlines: Govt Extends Long-Term Terminal Operations Agreement for Engro Vopak

SYS.summary: CDWP approved Rs435.7bn in development projects and sent six to ECNEC — broadens the public-sector digital/IT project pipeline SYS competes for, a mild sector tailwind rather than a company-specific catalyst.
headlines: CDWP Approves Rs435.7bn Projects, Sends Six to ECNEC
